final:
module top_module(
    input [31:0] in,
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input en,
    output reg [31:0] out);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always@(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt)
begin
    if(rst)
        out <= 32'h00003000; 
    else if(en)
        out <= in;
end

endmodule
